---
title: "Untitled"
author: "Gonzalo Salomoni"
date: "2026-06-04"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(sf)
library(spdep)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# 1. Cargar mapa DEA2014
dz_mapa <- st_read(
  "Irlanda del Norte/geography-dz2021-geojson/DZ2021.geojson",
  quiet = TRUE
)

dea_mapa <- dz_mapa %>%
  group_by(DEA2014_cd, DEA2014_nm) %>%
  summarise(
    geometry = st_union(geometry),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

```{r}
# 2. Leer Excel con encabezados múltiples
# 2. Leer Excel de identidad nacional x religión

raw <- read_excel("Irlanda del Norte/ni-census21-people-dea14-nat_id_basic+religion_belong_to_or_brought_up_in_dvo-f481e0f4.xlsx",
  sheet = "Table",
  skip = 4,
  col_names = FALSE
)

headers <- raw[1:2, ]
datos_raw <- raw[-c(1:2), ]

# La 4ª categoría religiosa aparece como NA, pero corresponde a "None"
religion_headers <- as.character(headers[2, 3:ncol(headers)])
religion_headers[is.na(religion_headers)] <- "None"

nombres <- c(
  "dea_code",
  "dea_name",
  paste(
    as.character(headers[1, 3:ncol(headers)]),
    religion_headers,
    sep = "__"
  )
)

names(datos_raw) <- nombres
```

```{r}
# 3. Crear variables clave

# 3. Crear variables clave: religión + identidad

datos_dea <- datos_raw %>%
  transmute(
    dea_code,
    dea_name,

    # Identidad irlandesa total
    identidad_irlandesa =
      as.numeric(`Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish only__Other religions`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish only__None`),

    # Identidad británica total
    identidad_britanica =
      as.numeric(`British only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`British only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`British only__Other religions`) +
      as.numeric(`British only__None`),

    # Católicos totales: sumar todas las identidades nacionales dentro de Catholic
    catolicos =
      as.numeric(`British only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`Northern Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`British and Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`British and Northern Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish and Northern Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`British, Irish and Northern Irish only__Catholic`) +
      as.numeric(`Other__Catholic`),

    # Protestantes totales
    protestantes =
      as.numeric(`British only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`Northern Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`British and Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`British and Northern Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`Irish and Northern Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`British, Irish and Northern Irish only__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`) +
      as.numeric(`Other__Protestant and Other Christian (including Christian related)`)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    total = catolicos + protestantes,

    pct_catolicos = 100 * catolicos / total,
    pct_protestantes = 100 * protestantes / total,
    pct_identidad_irlandesa = 100 * identidad_irlandesa / total,
    pct_identidad_britanica = 100 * identidad_britanica / total,

    indice_nacional =
      scale(pct_catolicos)[,1] +
      scale(pct_identidad_irlandesa)[,1] -
      scale(pct_protestantes)[,1] -
      scale(pct_identidad_britanica)[,1]
  )
```

```{r}
# 4. Unir datos al mapa

dea_sf <- dea_mapa %>%
  left_join(
    datos_dea,
    by = c("DEA2014_cd" = "dea_code")
  )

dea_sf %>%
  st_drop_geometry() %>%
  summarise(
    total = n(),
    con_datos = sum(!is.na(indice_nacional)),
    sin_datos = sum(is.na(indice_nacional))
  )
```

```{r}
# 5. Moran global

vecinos <- poly2nb(dea_sf, queen = TRUE)

pesos <- nb2listw(
  vecinos,
  style = "W",
  zero.policy = TRUE
)

moran_global <- moran.test(
  dea_sf$indice_nacional,
  pesos,
  zero.policy = TRUE
)

moran_global
```

```{r}
# 6. Moran local

local_moran <- localmoran(
  dea_sf$indice_nacional,
  pesos,
  zero.policy = TRUE
)

dea_sf$Ii <- local_moran[, "Ii"]
dea_sf$p_value <- local_moran[, "Pr(z != E(Ii))"]

dea_sf$indice_z <- as.numeric(scale(dea_sf$indice_nacional))

dea_sf$lag_indice <- lag.listw(
  pesos,
  dea_sf$indice_z,
  zero.policy = TRUE
)
```

```{r}
# 7. Clasificación LISA
alpha <- 0.05

dea_sf <- dea_sf %>%
  mutate(
    lisa_cluster = case_when(
      p_value >= alpha ~ "No significativo",
      indice_z > 0 & lag_indice > 0 ~ "Alto-Alto irlandés-católico",
      indice_z < 0 & lag_indice < 0 ~ "Alto-Alto británico-protestante",
      indice_z > 0 & lag_indice < 0 ~ "Alto-Bajo",
      indice_z < 0 & lag_indice > 0 ~ "Bajo-Alto",
      TRUE ~ "No significativo"
    )
  )

table(dea_sf$lisa_cluster)
```

```{r}
# 8. Mapa LISA

mapa_lisa <- ggplot() +
  geom_sf(
    data = dea_sf,
    aes(fill = lisa_cluster),
    color = "grey35",
    linewidth = 0.15
  ) +
  geom_sf(
    data = st_union(dea_sf),
    fill = NA,
    color = "grey20",
    linewidth = 0.4
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "Alto-Alto irlandés-católico" = "#1A9850",
      "Alto-Alto británico-protestante" = "#D7191C",
      "Alto-Bajo" = "#A6D96A",
      "Bajo-Alto" = "#FDAE61",
      "No significativo" = "grey85"
    ),
    name = NULL
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Mapa LISA del eje nacional-religioso, 2021"
  ) +
  coord_sf(datum = NA) +
  theme_void()

ggsave(
  filename = "LISA_nacional_religioso_DEA2021.png",
  plot = mapa_lisa,
  width = 10,
  height = 8,
  dpi = 300,
  bg = "white"
)
```
